description_long: This is a modern, rectangular computer desk with a sleek black finish and subtle cyan accent lighting along the edges. The desk features a large flat tabletop supporting a widescreen monitor, a full-sized keyboard, a mouse on a mousepad, a pair of headphones on a stand, and a tall, rectangular computer tower. The legs are simple and sturdy, providing stable support for the equipment. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting ambient light and giving the desk a high-tech appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible drawers or storage compartments, emphasizing functionality and aesthetics. The setup is clearly optimized for computer use, likely for gaming or office work.
description: A sleek black computer desk with cyan accent lighting, supporting a monitor, keyboard, mouse, headphones, and a computer tower. The design is minimalist and modern, with a glossy finish and no visible storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor, keyboard, mouse, headphones, and computer tower arranged on the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the arrangement of the computer tower and monitor.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and computer tower, with headphones and mouse visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the monitor and the clean, unadorned rear of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The side with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse is intended to face the user, with the computer tower positioned to the left and the headphones on the right.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation for gaming or office tasks
